      "category": "Cryptographic Logic Error",
      "file": "authz/client/src/main/java/org/keycloak/authorization/client/util/crypto/ASN1Decoder.java",
      "line": 56,
      "title": "Incorrect length calculation in readSequence()",
      "description": "In the readSequence() method, the length tracking logic is flawed. The variable 'length' is decremented by bytes.length (line 56: 'length = length - bytes.length'), but bytes.length includes the tag and length encoding bytes, not just the content. This causes the loop to exit prematurely or read an incorrect number of elements from the ASN.1 sequence, potentially corrupting parsed cryptographic data.",
      "suggestion": "Track the actual content length separately from the loop counter, accounting for tag and length field bytes when reading each element."
    },
    {
      "severity": "medium",
      "category": "Incomplete Implementation",

      "title": "Incomplete read() method implementation",
      "description": "The read() method at the end of the file appears truncated in the diff (line 199 shows 'count++;' followed by '... (truncated)'). If the method implementation is incomplete, it could fail to properly track bytes read or handle edge cases, affecting the entire decoder's byte counting mechanism which is critical for ASN.1 parsing correctness.",
      "suggestion": "Verify the complete implementation of the read() method and ensure it properly returns the byte value and increments the counter."
    },
    {
      "severity": "medium",
      "category": "Initialization Order",
      "file": "authz/client/src/main/java/org/keycloak/authorization/client/AuthzClient.java",
      "line": 95,
      "title": "CryptoIntegration.init() called on every AuthzClient creation",
      "description": "CryptoIntegration.init(AuthzClient.class.getClassLoader()) is called every time AuthzClient.create() is invoked (line 95). This could cause repeated initialization overhead and potential issues if initialization is not idempotent. Layer 1 already flagged that the return value is ignored (L1-LOGIC-004), which compounds this issue—initialization failures would be silently swallowed.",
      "suggestion": "Move CryptoIntegration.init() to a static initializer block or call it once during application startup, rather than on every client creation."
    }
  ]
